title: POST request fails with 'Invalid URL' error
symptom: When executing a POST request in the HTTP Node, n8n throws an 'Invalid URL' error despite the environment variable being correctly set.
applies_when: Using HTTP Node for POST requests
root_cause: The HTTP Node's URL field for the POST request is likely set to 'fixed' mode instead of 'expression' mode. In fixed mode, the environment variable is not interpreted correctly, leading to the 'Invalid URL' error.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Node settings for the POST request
Change the URL field from 'fixed' mode to 'expression' mode
Use the expression to reference the environment variable
Save the workflow and try executing the POST request again
agent_instruction: Change the URL field in the POST request node to 'expression' mode and reference the environment variable correctly.
